name: dchat-desktop
description: D Chat Desktop - Cross-platform AI chat application

scripts.build: npm run build:backend && npm run build:frontend
scripts.test: npm run test -w @dchat/backend && npm run test -w @dchat/frontend
scripts.build:package: npm run build:backend && npm run build:frontend && npm run build:electron && bash scripts/prepare-backend-deps.sh && cd packages/electron && npx electron-builder --mac --config electron-builder.yml
